title: arctium lappa var. vulgare
intro: Arctium lappa var. vulgare, also known as the common burdock, is a biennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Arctium lappa var. vulgare include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve skin conditions. Arctium lappa var. vulgare is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and its roots are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
